title: Lost-autonomy triggers & secessionism: VanillaSC reproduces the paper's SCM finding (Catalonia 2010, Faroe 1994)
paper: Schulte, Scantamburlo & Ackren (2026), 'Lost autonomy triggers and the rise of secessionism', European Political Science Review 18:175-193, DOI 10.1017/S175577392510026X
reference_impl: authors' replication: SyntheticControlMethods Python package (Synth, pen='auto', n_optim=100, covariate predictors) -- published synthetic series shipped in the bundle
path_type: Path A (paper's empirical finding on the authors' data) + tracks the authors' published synthetic series
data_source: authors' Replication_files/dataset.xlsx (13 European autonomous regions, 1975-2021; compiled from public sources: Regional Authority Index, V-Dem, GDP/unemployment)
